what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon using stroked paths and small text labels to show a floorplan-like stepped shape annotated with x, y, and z axes.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox "0 0 24 24" with no explicit width or height.
Shape geometry is drawn with four path elements using currentColor stroke, round line caps, and round line joins.
The base shape is a trapezoid-like outline from y=19 to y=14, with a smaller raised form from y=14 to y=11 and a short vertical segment to y=9.
Three text elements label x, y, and z in currentColor with stroke disabled.
The z label is positioned at y="24", on the lower edge of the viewBox.
standouts: Combines line-art geometry with literal axis text labels inside one icon.
Uses currentColor for both strokes and text fill.
The coordinate labels make the icon read as an XYZ spatial or floorplan marker rather than a generic floorplan outline.
conventions: Follows common inline icon conventions: SVG namespace, 24px viewBox, no fill, currentColor, rounded strokes.
Uses path elements for the line drawing and text elements for axis labels.
Breaks from purely path-based icon construction by embedding live SVG text.
concerns: The z label at y="24" may sit on or beyond the lower visible boundary depending on renderer font metrics.
SVG text rendering can vary across environments compared with path-converted lettering.
notes: A compact currentColor floorplan/XYZ icon made from line paths plus small axis labels.
questions: Should the x, y, and z labels remain editable text, or should they be converted to paths for renderer consistency?
Is the z label intended to touch the bottom edge of the viewBox?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a floorplan-xyz icon, and the SVG content depicts a floorplan-like shape with x, y, and z labels, so the apparent purpose matches the content.
intention_signals: It seems intended to communicate a floorplan or surface with explicit XYZ dimensional context in a small UI icon.
novelty: The distinct feature is the use of embedded lowercase axis text labels within a simple stroked floorplan icon.
contribution: Contributes a compact visual substrate for representing spatial floorplan context with explicit x, y, and z coordinate cues in a color-inheriting SVG icon.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG line icon showing a stepped floorplan-like shape annotated with lowercase x, y, and z labels.
intention_for_embedding: This icon was for representing floorplan geometry with XYZ spatial or coordinate context in an interface.
